# Contributing to Frontend Stack Blueprint

Thank you for your interest in improving the Frontend Stack Blueprint!

## Types of Contributions

### 📦 Propose an Addition

Want to add a new technology to the stack? Open an issue using the
[Propose Addition](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/propose-addition.md) template.

### 🗑️ Propose a Removal

Think a technology should be removed? Open an issue using the
[Propose Removal](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/propose-removal.md) template.

### ⬆️ Propose a Version Upgrade

Want to bump a minimum version? Open an issue using the
[Propose Upgrade](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/propose-upgrade.md) template.

### 📝 Documentation Fixes

For typos, clarity improvements, or broken links — open a PR directly.

## Contribution Rules

1. **Evidence-based** — All proposals must include data/reasoning
2. **Production-proven** — Only propose tech with production track record
3. **Ecosystem fit** — Technology must work with the existing stack
4. **AI-friendly** — Sufficient LLM training data for quality code generation
5. **One change per PR** — Keep changes focused and reviewable
6. **Reliability impact** — State activation profile, CI/test evidence, accessibility,
   performance, security/privacy, compatibility, and recovery implications
7. **Capability-gated by default** — New dependencies need a concrete product
   capability unless they are essential to every project

## Versioning Impact

| Change Type                             | Version Bump |
| --------------------------------------- | ------------ |
| New technology in stack                 | MINOR        |
| Remove technology from stack            | MAJOR        |
| New deployment target                   | MINOR        |
| Minimum version bump                    | PATCH        |
| Documentation fix                       | PATCH        |
| New backward-compatible category/policy | MINOR        |
| Breaking mandatory rule or core swap    | MAJOR        |

## Code of Conduct

Be respectful. Focus on technical merit. This is a collaborative project.
